info.value: Guangzhou, also known as the City of Flowers, is the capital of Guangdong Province. It has a long history and rich culture. Every year, many tourists come to visit the Canton Tower, which is one of the tallest towers in the world. The food in Guangzhou is famous all over China, especially its snacks. People here like to have morning tea with their family and friends. The weather in Guangzhou is warm and wet, so you can see green trees and beautiful flowers all year round. It’s really a wonderful place to visit.
